name: gmail-list-messages
description:
List messages from the authenticated Gmail account. Filter by Gmail search query (e.g. 'is:unread newer_than:24h'), cap results, and receive structured metadata (id, subject, from, date, snippet). Canonical building block for morning-brief / inbox-triage / follow-up-detector workflows.

Requires a vault:// reference to an Atlassian-style Google OAuth access token in the AUTH_HEADER config key. The controller resolves + refreshes the token at dispatch time — you only need to pass the vault path.

AUTH_HEADER.description: vault:// path to the OAuth access token wrapped in 'Bearer ' (e.g. 'Bearer vault://oauth/gmail/{user_id}/{email}/access_token'). The controller resolves the vault reference and refreshes the token if expired.

QUERY.description: Gmail search query — same syntax as the web UI. Common: 'is:unread newer_than:24h' (morning brief), 'label:important newer_than:1d', 'from:boss@company.com'. Empty → all mail.

MAX_RESULTS.description: Maximum messages to fetch metadata for (1–25). Each message requires one extra HTTP call for headers — keep tight to stay within fuel budget.

setup_instructions.title: Enable the Gmail API
setup_instructions.detail: In https://console.cloud.google.com, enable the Gmail API and configure OAuth consent with the 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly' scope (or 'gmail.metadata' if you only need headers).

setup_instructions.title: Authorize the integration
setup_instructions.detail: Complete the OAuth flow via your Talos integration UI or CLI. The controller stores the access_token + refresh_token at 'oauth/gmail/{user_id}/{email}/access_token' and 'oauth/gmail/{user_id}/{email}/refresh_token' respectively, and tracks expiry in integration_credentials.

setup_instructions.title: Configure AUTH_HEADER
setup_instructions.detail: Set AUTH_HEADER to 'Bearer vault://oauth/gmail/{your_user_id}/{your_email}/access_token'. The controller resolves the vault path + refreshes the token if needed before dispatching. If you hit 401s, call refresh_oauth_token(vault_path) to force-refresh and read the outcome.
